description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style. The front facade features a large garage door, a main entry door with glass panels, and several rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The property is enclosed by a low brick wall and includes a paved driveway, a side patio with outdoor furniture and umbrellas, and a backyard area with geometric paving and a small pool or water feature. The rear of the house has large glass doors opening onto the backyard, providing ample natural light and easy access to outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor areas, and a blend of privacy and openness.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and spacious outdoor living areas including a patio and backyard. The property is enclosed by a low brick wall and features geometric paving and a small pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, and symmetrical window arrangement, with a paved driveway and low brick wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended patio area with outdoor furniture and umbrellas, as well as the geometric backyard paving.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors, backyard access, and a small pool or water feature, with a focus on outdoor living space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick wall enclosure, additional paved areas, and the side of the house with fewer windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large glass doors at the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with glass-paneled door, paved steps, and minimal overhang, integrated into a clean, modern facade
